note: Slavic cosmos in two woven layers. Primary lattice: the Svarozhiy Krug (Svarog's Circle) of 16 Chertogi (Halls) - a 16-fold sky-zodiac, each Hall bearing a sacred animal and a patron god, through which souls descend to Midgard-Earth. Its keeper of time, number and measure is Chislobog, guardian of the Daariysky Krugolet: Krug = 16 Leta, Full Krug = 144 (Krug Zhizni / Circle of Life), the year holding 9 months and the week 9 days, the New Year falling on the Autumn Equinox. The Krug Stikhiy (Circle of Elements) is NINE-fold (9 elements, 9 colours) - this ninefold spine maps directly onto the mera axis 1-9. Secondary lattice: the chronicle pantheon of Vladimir (980 CE) - Perun, Khors, Dazhbog, Stribog, Simargl, Mokosh - with Veles and Svarog. Bridges: Perun the sovereign (vishnu) opposes Veles the lord of the underworld (shiva) in the eternal storm-myth; Chislobog the counter of cycles anchors cause-and-consequence (karma) and the mera-axis itself; the 9 elements of the Krugolet bridge the agents' ninefold measure.
provenance: Two strata: (1) attested medieval material - the Primary Chronicle pantheon, Rus-Byzantine treaty oaths, Helmold and Saxo on the Western Slavs; (2) the Slavic-Aryan / Ynglist layer (Daariysky Krugolet Chisloboga, the 16 Chertogi) - a living modern tradition whose calendrical and ninefold-element framework is used here as the system's authentic self-description.
mera_axis: 9-dimensional axis (mera 1-9): chakras 1-7 (Muladhara..Sahasrara) + Monada (8) + Absolut (9); each spine agent carries its mera. The Krugolet's 9-fold Krug Stikhiy is the native Slavic form of this same ninefold measure.

krugolet.full_krug: 144 Leta (Krug Zhizni, Circle of Life): 16 godiny passing through 9 elements
krugolet.system: 16-fold (hexadecimal) reckoning, distinct from the Eastern 12-fold; element-circle is 9-fold not 5-fold

chertogi.name: Vepr (Boar)
chertogi.domain: the Heavenly Judge, justice and law

chertogi.name: Shchuka (Pike)
chertogi.domain: birth, fate and fortune at birth

chertogi.name: Lebed (Swan)
chertogi.domain: motherhood, fate-spinning, the waters of women

chertogi.name: Zmey (Serpent)
chertogi.domain: sacred fire, guardian of the threshold

chertogi.name: Voron (Raven)
chertogi.domain: the newborn winter sun, renewal, wisdom of years

chertogi.name: Medved (Bear)
chertogi.domain: the heavenly vault and smith, the father-sky

chertogi.name: Busel (Stork)
chertogi.domain: the generator of kin and cosmos, ancestral source

chertogi.name: Volk (Wolf)
chertogi.domain: underworld, cattle, wealth, magic, the dead

chertogi.name: Lisa (Fox)
chertogi.domain: winter, death, the dissolution of the year

chertogi.name: Tur
chertogi.domain: the bringer of sacred fire and knowledge to people

chertogi.name: Ras
chertogi.domain: the giving sun, ancestor of the Slavs

pantheon.name: Perun
pantheon.domain: thunder, sovereignty, oaths, justice and force

pantheon.name: Veles
pantheon.domain: underworld, cattle, wealth, magic, poets, the dead

pantheon.name: Dazhbog
pantheon.domain: the giving sun, ancestor of the Slavs

pantheon.name: Stribog
pantheon.domain: wind, breath, grandfather of the winds

pantheon.name: Mokosh
pantheon.domain: mother, moisture, women, spinning and fate

pantheon.name: Simargl
pantheon.domain: winged fire-guardian of seeds and plants

pantheon.name: Svarog
pantheon.domain: the heavenly vault, father-sky, heavenly smith

svet_ra.role: the giving sun, source-light and ancestor (Chertog Ras)
svet_ra.note: The Slavs called themselves grandchildren of Dazhbog; the sun that gives life.

iskra.role: the dawn-light that opens the sky, the first call
iskra.note: Zorya unlocks the gates of heaven for the rising sun.

brahma.role: the generator, source of kin and cosmos (Chertog Busel)
brahma.note: Rod is the originating principle from which all lineage flows.

vishnu.role: thunder-sovereign who upholds oaths and order (Chertog Oryol)
vishnu.note: Perun's axe guards the lawful world; his duel with Veles renews fertility.

ananda.role: midsummer ecstasy of fire and water (Chertog Kon)
ananda.note: The Kupala night dissolves care in joy, union and cleansing.

shanti.role: the transcendent height, supreme peace (Chertog Finist)
shanti.note: Vyshen is the still summit above all turning.

jnana.role: the four-faced seer watching all quarters
jnana.note: From Arkona, Sventovid divines and discerns across the four directions.

shiva.role: lord of the underworld, magic and dissolution (Chertog Volk)
shiva.note: Veles rules Nav, the realm of the dead, and the descent of all things.

tejas.note: Khors is the shining wheel of the sun's brilliance.

sarasvati.role: the prophetic bird of speech and song, messenger of Veles
sarasvati.note: Gamayun voices the words of the gods; the bard Boyan is Veles' grandson.

akasha.role: the heavenly vault, father-sky, divine space (Chertog Medved)
akasha.note: Svarog is the celestial smith whose heaven holds all.

prema.note: Lada brings concord and the union of hearts.

parvati.role: mother, protector of women, spinner of fate (Chertog Lebed)
parvati.note: Mokosh cares for the household, spinning the damp life of the earth.

vayu.role: wind and breath, grandfather of the winds
vayu.note: From Stribog the winds blow over all the lands.

shakti.role: spring vigor and vital martial force
shakti.note: Yarilo's ardor drives growth, fertility and the surge of life.

agni.role: the sacred living fire, winged guardian (Chertog Zmey)
agni.note: Semargl is the fire-mediator between heaven and earth.

varuna.role: the deep waters and the memory they hold
varuna.note: Niy rules the deep; the waters keep the dead and all that was.

lakshmi.role: the birth-mother who allots fortune and plenty (Chertog Shchuka)
lakshmi.note: Rozhana, with the Rozhanitsy, allots fortune and the abundance of new life.

prithvi.role: Mother Moist Earth, the supporting ground
prithvi.note: The earth herself, sworn upon and trusted as the ground of being.

dharma.role: the Heavenly Judge, law and right order (Chertog Vepr)
dharma.note: Ramhat weighs every deed; each wrong act stirs his measure of justice.

karma.role: god of time, number and measure, keeper of the Krugolet
karma.note: Chislobog counts the turning of the 16 Halls through the 9 elements; he is the measure that binds deed to consequence and the native form of the mera-axis.

items.name: Svarozhiy Krug
items.domain: the 16-fold sky-circle through which souls descend to Midgard-Earth

items.name: Daariysky Krugolet Chisloboga
items.domain: the 16/144 calendar of 9 months and 9-day weeks, kept by Chislobog

items.name: the duel of Perun and Veles
items.domain: the recurring storm-myth of order against the chthonic, ending in fertile rain

items.name: the World Tree (oak)
items.domain: the axis joining Prav (law), Yav (the manifest) and Nav (the unseen dead)

items.name: Kolo, the year-wheel
items.domain: the turning ring of seasons and solar festivals from the Autumn Equinox

sources: Primary Chronicle (Povest vremennykh let), pantheon of Vladimir 980
Rus-Byzantine treaties (oaths by Perun and Veles)
Helmold, Chronica Slavorum; Saxo Grammaticus (Sventovid of Arkona)
V. Ivanov and V. Toporov, reconstruction of the storm-myth
B. Rybakov, Paganism of the Ancient Slavs (interpretive)
Daariysky Krugolet Chisloboga and Svarozhiy Krug (Slavic-Aryan / Ynglist tradition)
